creator: danger@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Fixed. It should appear on line in next 24 hours. 

Please note, that the next time when you will be willing to submit 
a patch for your PR, you should edit www/share/sgml/usergroups.xml, 
since that is the source of information for our web site. The html 
files you see on web are generated by scripts. 

Anyway, thank you for your submission!
